creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
I'm sorry, but at present I have no ability to test fresh patches.

In general, I do not try to keep up with -CURRENT on my normal/production
macchines, so I would need to dedicate a disk to holding just -CURRENT and
I do not have any spares at the moment.

I will just have to hope that you fix works, and that it will be present
in either 9.1-RC4 or else in 9.1-RELEASE.  (I am assuming that it did not
quite make it into -RC3.)

Thank you for your efforts.
